title: Investor Pitch Deck
description: Investor deck for Frequency, a company seeking funding to scale its operations. The presentation was crafted to clearly communicate their value proposition, market opportunity, business model, and financial projections — all with a clean, compelling design tailored for potential investors.

title: CCS Presentation Design
description: Professional deck for CCS, showcasing their innovative solutions and growth strategy. The presentation highlighted their core services, market positioning, traction, and future plans — designed to attract investors.

title: Marketing Presentation
description: A sleek and visually engaging presentation for a fashion company to showcase their brand, collections, and creative direction. The slides were crafted to reflect the company's unique style and vision, using high-impact visuals and clean layouts to highlight their work effectively.

title: Uplift Presentation
description: Modern and compelling presentation for Uplift, designed to showcase their mission, services, and key achievements. The design emphasized clarity and visual appeal, helping communicate their impact and future vision in a clean way.

title: Astella Finance Presentation
description: Clean and professional presentation for Astella, a finance company focused on delivering innovative financial solutions. The deck was structured to showcase their services, market expertise, and strategic vision — using a sophisticated layout that reflects trust, clarity, and credibility in the finance industry.

title: Gaming Presentation
description: A dynamic and stylish presentation for Ellitestamp, a unique brand at the intersection of gaming and fashion. The slides showcase their innovative products and creative collaborations.

title: Mobile App Presentation
description: A vibrant and user-focused presentation for Changift, a mobile app company. The deck highlights the app's key features, user benefits, and growth strategy — using clean visuals and engaging layouts to effectively communicate the brand's value and vision.

title: Blend Presentation
description: An inviting and visually appetizing presentation for Blend, a restaurant company. The slides highlight their culinary offerings, ambiance, and brand story — using warm colors and appealing visuals to showcase the dining experience and attract customers.
